args.sql:
SELECT kommunenummer,
       ST_XMin(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS xmin,
       ST_YMin(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS ymin,
       ST_XMax(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS xmax,
       ST_YMax(ST_Extent(omrade)) AS ymax
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%kristiansand%';

WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%kristiansand%'
GROUP BY kommunenummer;

4.description: find buildings that intersect 200-year storm-surge areas

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%kristiansand%'
LIMIT 1;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkelenbygning]
SELECT objid, bygningid, kommunenummer, ST_Transform(representasjonspunkt,25833) AS geom
FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning
WHERE kommunenummer = '4204' AND representasjonspunkt IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT objid, ST_Transform(omrade,25833) AS geom
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna;

SELECT objid, ST_Transform(omrade,25833) AS geom
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna;

1.description: get Kristiansand kommunenummer and bbox of municipality geometry

2.description: get buildings in the municipality with geometry

3.description: get 200-year storm-surge polygons within municipality bbox

4.description: get 200-year flood zone polygons within municipality bbox

5.description: find buildings that intersect storm-surge polygons

6.description: from previous matches, find those that also intersect flood zones

7.description: collapse to one row per building (unique bygningid)

  ST_XMin(ST_Envelope(ST_Transform(omrade,25833))) AS xmin,
  ST_YMin(ST_Envelope(ST_Transform(omrade,25833))) AS ymin,
  ST_XMax(ST_Envelope(ST_Transform(omrade,25833))) AS xmax,

WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%kristiansand%'
LIMIT 1;

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer,
  ST_XMin(ST_Envelope(ST_Transform(omrade,25833))) AS xmin,
  ST_YMin(ST_Envelope(ST_Transform(omrade,25833))) AS ymin,
  ST_XMax(ST_Envelope(ST_Transform(omrade,25833))) AS xmax,
  ST_YMax(ST_Envelope(ST_Transform(omrade,25833))) AS ymax
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%kristiansand%'
LIMIT 1;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkelenbygning]
SELECT objid, bygningid, kommunenummer, ST_Transform(representasjonspunkt,25833) AS geom
FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning
WHERE kommunenummer = '4204' AND representasjonspunkt IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [stormflohavniva]
SELECT objid, opphav, omrade
FROM stormflohavniva_bd7c84ed67254396b81e18b48ee0f525.stormflo200ar_klimaarna
WHERE ST_Intersects(omrade, ST_MakeEnvelope(62543.56990607368,6428946.019998128,107683.72996255726,6493405.01999838,25833));

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: query [flomsoner]
SELECT objid, gjentaksintervall, omrade
FROM flomsoner_76d14d5fe2fd4a29bfffc266fdcdd820.flomareal
WHERE gjentaksintervall = 200 AND ST_Intersects(omrade, ST_MakeEnvelope(62543.56990607368,6428946.019998128,107683.72996255726,6493405.01999838,25833));
